description_long: This sculpture is a detailed bust of a young male figure, featuring intricately carved curly hair and a strong, classical facial expression. The head is slightly turned to the left, with deep-set eyes and a furrowed brow, conveying a sense of intensity and contemplation. The neck and upper chest are included, with the base cut off in a stylized, angular fashion. The back of the head displays voluminous, textured curls, while the shoulders and chest are smooth and idealized. The material appears to be a solid, matte white stone or plaster, giving the sculpture a timeless, classical appearance. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or additional decorative elements.
description: A classical white bust of a young male with curly hair and a serious expression, rendered in smooth, detailed stone or plaster. The sculpture features a stylized base and finely textured hair.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the intense facial expression, detailed curls, and the stylized cut of the base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the voluminous, textured curls and the smooth, broad back of the neck and shoulders.
description_view_2: Back-right view focusing on the layered curls and the smooth transition from the neck to the base.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the facial features, especially the eyes and nose, with shadows accentuating the depth of the sculpture.
attribute_location_context: No visible context or environment; background is plain and featureless.
